name: McGill Park
description: McGill Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canal Winchester, OH. There are 5 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Olivedale Park
description: Come play pickleball at Olivedale Park in Lancaster, OH! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: The Pickle Hut
description: Come play pickleball at The Pickle Hut in Lancaster, OH! There is 1 indoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons, water, and restrooms. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Must be reserved on their website

name: YMCA RecPlex
description: YMCA RecPlex is a place to play pickleball in Lancaster, OH. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, water, youth programming, and food.
fees: Fee required — $7 for Members and $9 for Non-Members
